---
name: Documentation Request
about: Propose changes or additions to the community guides or README files
title: '[DOCS] '
labels: documentation
assignees: ''
---

**Which document needs update or creation?**
Please specify the file name or folder (e.g., docs/CONTRIBUTING.md or a new guide name).

**Describe the proposed changes**
A clear and concise description of what needs to be added, corrected, or clarified.

**Why is this change necessary?**
Explain the benefit of this documentation update (e.g., outdated setup instructions, typo, unclear phrasing).

**Additional context**
Add any other context, links, or references here.
